judgments.notes: The narration is smooth, with natural expression and good pacing. Pronunciation is clear, and there is no robotic or mechanical texture. The pauses around punctuation are appropriate. The emotional tone fits the literary context. There are no choppy joins or glitches detected. Overall, it is a high-quality sample, though not entirely flawless, as there is slight room for improvement in pacing and emotional depth.
